title: Training Budget and Professional Development Request Process
text:
Q: How can I request funding for training and professional development?
A: Employees can request funding for training and professional development by submitting a formal request through the HR portal. To initiate the process, complete the 'Professional Development Request Form' available under the 'Resources' section. Ensure that your request includes details about the training program, associated costs, and how it aligns with your current role and career goals. All requests must be submitted at least 30 days prior to the training date. The HR team will review submissions on a monthly basis, and you will receive a response within two weeks of submission. For any questions or assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
